div.p: Three-phase crash recovery with data dependencies

ul.li: Undo processes in global LSN order (max-heap)
Each undo writes a CLR before proceeding
If crash during undo, CLRs enable resumption
undo_next_lsn points to next record to undo
Recovery is idempotent (N runs = same state)

g.title: Check for partial page writes via checksums/torn-bit
Check for partial page writes via checksums/torn-bit
